SEARCH
モジュール org.commonutils
パッケージ org.commonutils.lang

クラス NumberSupport

java.lang.Object
org.commonutils.lang.NumberSupport
public final class NumberSupport extends Object
Static helpers for numeric strings and simple bounds: digit checks, JDK-compatible parsing with optional defaults, and clamp. Use with StringSupport.trimToNull(String) semantics for consistent trimming of string inputs.

Trimming

String-taking methods that parse numbers normalize input with StringSupport.trimToNull(String) (JDK String.trim(), not Unicode String.strip()). null or blank-after-trim is treated as missing input for to* methods (default returned) and isParsable(String) (false). isDigits(CharSequence) uses StringSupport.isEmpty(CharSequence) and does not trim; leading or trailing spaces therefore yield false.

Lenient to* vs strict parse*

toInt / toLong / toDouble
Never throw for bad input: missing or unparseable values return the overload default (or zero for single-argument overloads).
parseInt / parseLong / parseDouble
Throw NumberFormatException when the value is null, blank after trim, or not parseable by the corresponding JDK parse* method on the trimmed string.

isParsable vs isDigits

isParsable(String) returns true exactly when Double.parseDouble(String) succeeds on the trimmed string (including hexadecimal floats, signed values, exponent notation, and the literals "NaN" and infinities as accepted by the JDK). isDigits(CharSequence) requires every character to satisfy Character.isDigit(char) (no sign, no decimal point, no spaces).

clamp

For primitive overloads, min must be <= max or IllegalArgumentException is thrown. For clamp(double, double, double), bounds and value follow Math.max(int, int) and Math.min(int, int): a NaN value stays NaN; if min or max is NaN, range validation may not reject the pair (because comparisons with NaN are false).
関連項目:
  • StringSupport.trimToNull(String)

  • Nullability annotations (org.commonutils.annotation.Nullable, org.commonutils.annotation.NonNull) document contracts on signatures; org.commonutils.annotation.NonNull-annotated reference parameters are validated at runtime with java.lang.NullPointerException where applicable.

    Numeric constraints (org.commonutils.annotation.NonNegative, org.commonutils.annotation.Positive) document ranges on signatures; implementations enforce them at runtime with IllegalArgumentException.

  • メソッドの概要

    修飾子とタイプ
    メソッド
    説明
    static double
    clamp(double value, double min, double max)
    Returns value limited to the inclusive range [min, max], using Math.max(double, double) and Math.min(double, double).
    static int
    clamp(int value, int min, int max)
    Returns value limited to the inclusive range [min, max].
    static long
    clamp(long value, long min, long max)
    Returns value limited to the inclusive range [min, max].
    static boolean
    isDigits(@Nullable CharSequence value)
    Returns true if value is non-null, non-empty, and every code unit is a decimal digit per Character.isDigit(char).
    static boolean
    isParsable(@Nullable String value)
    Returns true if value is non-null, not blank after StringSupport.trimToNull(String), and Double.parseDouble(String) accepts the trimmed string.
    static double
    parseDouble(@Nullable String value)
    Parses value as a double after trim, or throws if missing or invalid.
    static int
    parseInt(@Nullable String value)
    Parses value as a signed decimal integer after trim, or throws if missing or invalid.
    static long
    parseLong(@Nullable String value)
    Parses value as a signed decimal long after trim, or throws if missing or invalid.
    static double
    toDouble(@Nullable String value)
    Parses value as a double, or returns 0.0 when missing or invalid.
    static double
    toDouble(@Nullable String value, double defaultValue)
    Parses value as a double after StringSupport.trimToNull(String), or returns defaultValue when null, blank after trim, or not parseable.
    static int
    toInt(@Nullable String value)
    Parses value as a signed decimal integer, or returns 0 when missing or invalid.
    static int
    toInt(@Nullable String value, int defaultValue)
    Parses value as a signed decimal integer after StringSupport.trimToNull(String), or returns defaultValue when null, blank after trim, or not parseable.
    static long
    toLong(@Nullable String value)
    Parses value as a signed decimal long, or returns 0L when missing or invalid.
    static long
    toLong(@Nullable String value, long defaultValue)
    Parses value as a signed decimal long after StringSupport.trimToNull(String), or returns defaultValue when null, blank after trim, or not parseable.

    クラスから継承されたメソッド java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • メソッドの詳細

    • isDigits

      public static boolean isDigits(@Nullable @Nullable CharSequence value)
      Returns true if value is non-null, non-empty, and every code unit is a decimal digit per Character.isDigit(char). Does not trim: surrounding whitespace makes the result false. Signs, decimal points, and grouping separators are not allowed.
      パラメータ:
      value - sequence to test, may be null
      戻り値:
      true if value is non-empty and all characters are digits
      関連項目:
      • isParsable(String)

    • isParsable

      public static boolean isParsable(@Nullable @Nullable String value)
      Returns true if value is non-null, not blank after StringSupport.trimToNull(String), and Double.parseDouble(String) accepts the trimmed string. This matches JDK parsing rules (including signed values, exponent notation, and "NaN" / infinity literals).
      パラメータ:
      value - string to test, may be null
      戻り値:
      true if trimmed value parses as a double
      関連項目:
      • isDigits(CharSequence)

    • toInt

      public static int toInt(@Nullable @Nullable String value)
      Parses value as a signed decimal integer, or returns 0 when missing or invalid. Equivalent to toInt(value, 0).
      パラメータ:
      value - string to parse, may be null
      戻り値:
      parsed int, or 0 when null, blank after trim, or not parseable
      関連項目:
      • toInt(String, int)
      • parseInt(String)

    • parseInt

      public static int parseInt(@Nullable @Nullable String value)
      Parses value as a signed decimal integer after trim, or throws if missing or invalid. Delegates to Integer.parseInt(String) on the trimmed string.
      パラメータ:
      value - string to parse, may be null
      戻り値:
      the parsed int
      例外:
      NumberFormatException - if value is null, blank after trim, or not a valid int
      関連項目:
      • toInt(String, int)

    • toInt

      public static int toInt(@Nullable @Nullable String value, int defaultValue)
      Parses value as a signed decimal integer after StringSupport.trimToNull(String), or returns defaultValue when null, blank after trim, or not parseable.
      パラメータ:
      value - string to parse, may be null
      defaultValue - value when input is missing or invalid
      戻り値:
      parsed int or defaultValue
      関連項目:
      • parseInt(String)

    • toLong

      public static long toLong(@Nullable @Nullable String value)
      Parses value as a signed decimal long, or returns 0L when missing or invalid. Equivalent to toLong(value, 0L).
      パラメータ:
      value - string to parse, may be null
      戻り値:
      parsed long, or 0L when null, blank after trim, or not parseable
      関連項目:
      • toLong(String, long)
      • parseLong(String)

    • parseLong

      public static long parseLong(@Nullable @Nullable String value)
      Parses value as a signed decimal long after trim, or throws if missing or invalid. Delegates to Long.parseLong(String) on the trimmed string.
      パラメータ:
      value - string to parse, may be null
      戻り値:
      the parsed long
      例外:
      NumberFormatException - if value is null, blank after trim, or not a valid long
      関連項目:
      • toLong(String, long)

    • toLong

      public static long toLong(@Nullable @Nullable String value, long defaultValue)
      Parses value as a signed decimal long after StringSupport.trimToNull(String), or returns defaultValue when null, blank after trim, or not parseable.
      パラメータ:
      value - string to parse, may be null
      defaultValue - value when input is missing or invalid
      戻り値:
      parsed long or defaultValue
      関連項目:
      • parseLong(String)

    • toDouble

      public static double toDouble(@Nullable @Nullable String value)
      Parses value as a double, or returns 0.0 when missing or invalid. Equivalent to toDouble(value, 0.0d).
      パラメータ:
      value - string to parse, may be null
      戻り値:
      parsed double, or 0.0 when null, blank after trim, or not parseable
      関連項目:
      • toDouble(String, double)
      • parseDouble(String)

    • parseDouble

      public static double parseDouble(@Nullable @Nullable String value)
      Parses value as a double after trim, or throws if missing or invalid. Delegates to Double.parseDouble(String) on the trimmed string.
      パラメータ:
      value - string to parse, may be null
      戻り値:
      the parsed double
      例外:
      NumberFormatException - if value is null, blank after trim, or not a valid double
      関連項目:
      • toDouble(String, double)

    • toDouble

      public static double toDouble(@Nullable @Nullable String value, double defaultValue)
      Parses value as a double after StringSupport.trimToNull(String), or returns defaultValue when null, blank after trim, or not parseable.
      パラメータ:
      value - string to parse, may be null
      defaultValue - value when input is missing or invalid
      戻り値:
      parsed double or defaultValue
      関連項目:
      • parseDouble(String)

    • clamp

      public static int clamp(int value, int min, int max)
      Returns value limited to the inclusive range [min, max].
      パラメータ:
      value - value to constrain
      min - inclusive lower bound
      max - inclusive upper bound (must be >= min)
      戻り値:
      value clamped to [min, max]
      例外:
      IllegalArgumentException - if min > max

    • clamp

      public static long clamp(long value, long min, long max)
      Returns value limited to the inclusive range [min, max].
      パラメータ:
      value - value to constrain
      min - inclusive lower bound
      max - inclusive upper bound (must be >= min)
      戻り値:
      value clamped to [min, max]
      例外:
      IllegalArgumentException - if min > max

    • clamp

      public static double clamp(double value, double min, double max)
      Returns value limited to the inclusive range [min, max], using Math.max(double, double) and Math.min(double, double). If value is NaN, the result is NaN. If min or max is NaN, validation may not throw even when the interval is not sensible; see class documentation.
      パラメータ:
      value - value to constrain
      min - inclusive lower bound
      max - inclusive upper bound (must be >= min when both are finite and ordered)
      戻り値:
      value clamped to [min, max]
      例外:
      IllegalArgumentException - if min > max (never true when either is NaN)
